# OpenMDM

> Embeddable Mobile Device Management SDK for TypeScript. OpenMDM is a library you add to your existing backend — not a separate MDM server — to manage Android device fleets from the same process and database as the rest of your app.

## Documentation

- [Agent Wire Protocol](https://openmdm.dev/docs/concepts/agent-protocol): Why /agent/* responses use an envelope, and how v1 and v2 clients coexist during rollout.
- [Architecture](https://openmdm.dev/docs/concepts/architecture): How OpenMDM fits into your backend and how data flows between your server and devices.
- [Commands vs Policies](https://openmdm.dev/docs/concepts/commands-and-policies): The single most confusing distinction in OpenMDM. Read this before writing anything.
- [Enrollment](https://openmdm.dev/docs/concepts/enrollment): How a device proves it's allowed to join the fleet and how OpenMDM validates it.
- [Operations](https://openmdm.dev/docs/concepts/operations): Logging, health probes, and what you need to know to run OpenMDM in production.
- [Installation](https://openmdm.dev/docs/installation): Install OpenMDM, set up your database schema, and create your first MDMInstance.
- [Introduction](https://openmdm.dev/docs/introduction): OpenMDM is an embeddable Mobile Device Management SDK you drop into your existing TypeScript application.
- [Tenant + RBAC Audit](https://openmdm.dev/docs/proposals/tenant-rbac-audit): A concrete, file-and-line audit of what multi-tenancy and authorization actually enforce in OpenMDM today, and the architectural fix path to 1.0.
- [Quick Start](https://openmdm.dev/docs/quick-start): From nothing to an enrolled device in about 15 minutes.
- [Kiosk Recipe](https://openmdm.dev/docs/recipes/kiosk): Lock devices to a single app, handle exit attempts, and unlock stuck devices.
- [Webhooks Recipe](https://openmdm.dev/docs/recipes/webhooks): Send HMAC-signed webhooks to an external system and verify them on the receiver.

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/azoila/openmdm)
- [npm organization](https://www.npmjs.com/org/openmdm)
